Our Restaurant

Welcome to our restaurant. Below you will find our full menu with seasonal selections.

Appetizers

Spring rolls with sweet chili sauce — a perfect way to start your meal.

Main Course

Grilled salmon with roasted vegetables, served with a lemon butter sauce.

Desserts

Chocolate lava cake with vanilla ice cream — our signature dessert.

Please ask your server about daily specials and allergen information.
